name: momentum_blend
_note: Showcases the multi-factor percentile-blend ranker on PRICE-ONLY factors, so it is fully backtestable over the entire price history (no fundamental filter, no fundamental blend factor -> data-readiness verdict: fully-backtestable). Quarterly rebalance (Trendlyne's strongest cadence), regime overlay for drawdown control, ATR stop + R-multiple target, ADTV cap, and a 15% max-weight-per-stock cap. Ranks by a 7-slot blend: relative strength 25, abs-momentum 15, vol-adj momentum 15, ADX 10, volume confirmation 10, entry-timing(RSI) 15, short-momentum 10. This is the price-only analogue of the DVM blend used to validate the engine over long history while fundamental history accrues.
